        public global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::TestNamespace.Address> Address => __Address ?? __Init_Singleton(ref __Address, __Create_Address());

        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::TestNamespace.Address>? __Address;

        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::TestNamespace.Address> __Create_Address()
        {
            return new global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenObjectTypeShape<global::TestNamespace.Address>
            {
                PropertiesFactory = __CreateProperties_Address,
                ConstructorFactory = __CreateConstructor_Address,
                IsRecordType = true,
                Provider = this,
            };
        }

            };
        }
